title: rubus thyrsanthus var. subvelutinus
intro: Rubus thyrsanthus var. subvelutinus, also known as the velvet raspberry or subvelutinous raspberry, is a variety of the raspberry plant native to the Pacific coast of North America, characterized by its distinctive velvety leaves and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus thyrsanthus var. subvelutinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
